headline: Can NuScale Power Stock Grow 10x?
summary: NuScale Power (NYSE:SMR) might be one of the riskiest nuclear stocks out there. But it could also be one of the biggest winners over the next decade.

headline: Nasdaq 100 Drops Over 1%, Oil Tops $106 On Iran Impasse: Stock Market Today
summary: Nasdaq sinks 1.1% as AMAT, MU, ORCL and Vertiv crater on AI capex jitters, while WTI tops $106 and the 10-year yield hovers near 4.6% on stalled US-Iran talks.

headline: PWRD: Worth Revisiting During The Current Energy Crisis
summary: PWRD has outperformed the S&P 500, delivering strong returns driven by exposure to energy, data centers, and power infrastructure. Read more on the PWRD ETF here.
